case_notes: Post-synthetically modified UiO-66-NH2 material; compare with parent UiO-66-NH2.
source_dataset: Crickmore & Bradshaw, University of Southampton dataset supporting PhD thesis: Metal-organic framework composites for nuclear waste clean-up
license: Creative Commons Attribution (as stated for dataset files on repository page)
source_axis_note: Source column label says mass loss (%), but values start at 100; stored here as normalized mass remaining percent.
formula_or_formula_note: Unknown/modified UiO-66-NH2 derivative; enter exact post-synthetic formula if known
mandatory_user_fields_for_quantitative_s: guest-free framework formula or framework molar mass
temperature window(s) for assigned guest/solvent loss
candidate guest identities and molar masses
atmosphere and heating rate, if comparing decomposition temperature
blank/support fraction if composite/binder mode is used
